title: Kamilskis Additions
description: Its a mod that adds everything I ever thought of and that would make sense in minecraft, and makes it balanced for the survival experience.
body:
# A bunch of stuff I thought would be cool to have in Minecraft.

**This mod doesn’t follow a single theme — it’s more of a creative dump for ideas I’ve had that felt like they should exist in the game. Some of it’s magic-flavored, some of it’s just useful or weird. Think of it as a toolbox of features: new mechanics, items, blocks, and whatever else I feel like adding.**

# What’s in it?
 - New magical-ish items and tools
 
 - Light worldgen changes
 
 - Random mechanics and experiments
 
 - Balanced with survival/modded play in mind
 
 - Designed to feel like they belong in Minecraft


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

 - 🐍

</details>



# Why?
Because I wanted to. And maybe you'll like it.

## Technical Stuff

its only for Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge and it will never change, unless the libraries I use also update

This mod will keep growing. Sometimes features will be small, sometimes bigger. If something feels broken or dumb, let me know, or don't.

(Screenshots coming soon probably)

Just a heads up. Change your keybinds called "Utility/Combat charm use".
its recommended to set them as mouse side buttons for convienience but you can change them to whatever feels the best.



## WARNING

**The mod ma- MAY cause crashes and theres a teeny tiny chance that it will corrupt your world- BUT ITS TINY! ITS SO TINY, you won't even see it. FOR MY DEFENSE every mod can crash your game if handled improperly. I rest my case.**

- avoid any unintended interaction with a mob called _JG HEART™_
- dont throw a boomerang into **The Nether™** portal


### Honorable Mention
- jerry
- kszaczuch

## If you have any complaints or questions (I bet you won't).
### **_we can have a talk_**

don't worry! I won't get mad!
